prompt: Add cron-style job scheduling with expression parsing for minute/hour/day patterns

<task>
Add cron-style job scheduling with expression parsing for minute/hour/day patterns
</task>

arguments.summary: Read Scheduler with simple interval-based scheduling. Need to add cron expression parsing. Will create a CronExpr type that parses '*/5 * *' style patterns (minute, hour, day).

next_steps.description: Create internal/scheduler/cron.go with CronExpr struct and ParseCron(expr) that handles *, */N, and specific values for minute/hour/day fields
Add Matches(time.Time) method to CronExpr that checks if a time matches the cron expression

arguments.summary: Created cron expression parser with CronExpr/CronField types. Supports * (all), */N (interval), and specific values for minute/hour/day. Matches() checks if a time.Time matches. 4 tests pass.
arguments.final_answer:
Created internal/scheduler/cron.go with cron expression parsing:
- ParseCron("*/5 * *") parses 3-field expressions (minute hour day)
- Supports: * (wildcard), */N (interval), specific values
- Matches(time.Time) checks if time matches expression
- 4 tests passing: wildcards, intervals, specific times, invalid input
